query: NPS scores for tmart fresh food orders, last 6 months

findings.content: Overall NPS for tmart fresh food is 34, up from 28 six months ago
Customers who order only fresh items rate NPS at 41, significantly above platform average
Repeat fresh buyers (3+ orders) have NPS of 58, suggesting trust builds with experience
Top complaint: 'items near expiry' accounts for 23% of negative NPS responses

summary: Fresh food NPS is trending positive (34, up from 28) with strong signal that trust builds through repeat purchases. Repeat buyers show NPS of 58 vs 41 for first-timers. Main drag is expiry concerns at 23% of negative responses.
raw_query: SELECT category, AVG(nps_score) as avg_nps, COUNT(*) as n FROM prod.nps_responses WHERE category = 'fresh' AND response_date >= '2025-10-01' GROUP BY category
